kjv.PSA_104_11: They give drink to every beast of the field: the wild asses quench their thirst.
kjv.PSA_104_12: By them shall the fowls of the heaven have their habitation, which sing among the branches.
kjv.PSA_104_13: He watereth the hills from his chambers: the earth is satisfied with the fruit of thy works.
kjv.PSA_104_14: He causeth the grass to grow for the cattle, and herb for the service of man: that he may bring forth food out of the earth;
kjv.PSA_104_15: And wine that maketh glad the heart of man, and oil to make his face to shine, and bread which strengtheneth man's heart.
kjv.PSA_104_16: The trees of the Lord are full of sap; the cedars of Lebanon, which he hath planted;
kjv.PSA_104_17: Where the birds make their nests: as for the stork, the fir trees are her house.
kjv.PSA_104_18: The high hills are a refuge for the wild goats; and the rocks for the conies.
kjv.PSA_104_19: He appointed the moon for seasons: the sun knoweth his going down.
kjv.PSA_104_20: Thou makest darkness, and it is night: wherein all the beasts of the forest do creep forth.
kjv.PSA_104_21: The young lions roar after their prey, and seek their meat from God.
kjv.PSA_104_22: The sun ariseth, they gather themselves together, and lay them down in their dens.
kjv.PSA_104_23: Man goeth forth unto his work and to his labour until the evening.
kjv.PSA_104_24: O Lord, how manifold are thy works! in wisdom hast thou made them all: the earth is full of thy riches.
kjv.PSA_104_25: So is this great and wide sea, wherein are things creeping innumerable, both small and great beasts.
kjv.PSA_104_26: There go the ships: there is that leviathan, whom thou hast made to play therein.
kjv.PSA_104_27: These wait all upon thee; that thou mayest give them their meat in due season.
kjv.PSA_104_28: That thou givest them they gather: thou openest thine hand, they are filled with good.
kjv.PSA_104_29: Thou hidest thy face, they are troubled: thou takest away their breath, they die, and return to their dust.
kjv.PSA_104_30: Thou sendest forth thy spirit, they are created: and thou renewest the face of the earth.
kjv.PSA_104_31: The glory of the Lord shall endure for ever: the Lord shall rejoice in his works.
kjv.PSA_104_32: He looketh on the earth, and it trembleth: he toucheth the hills, and they smoke.
kjv.PSA_104_33: I will sing unto the Lord as long as I live: I will sing praise to my God while I have my being.
kjv.PSA_104_34: My meditation of him shall be sweet: I will be glad in the Lord.
kjv.PSA_104_35: Let the sinners be consumed out of the earth, and let the wicked be no more. Bless thou the Lord, O my soul. Praise ye the Lord.
kjv.PSA_105_1: O give thanks unto the Lord; call upon his name: make known his deeds among the people.
kjv.PSA_105_2: Sing unto him, sing psalms unto him: talk ye of all his wondrous works.
kjv.PSA_105_3: Glory ye in his holy name: let the heart of them rejoice that seek the Lord.
kjv.PSA_105_4: Seek the Lord, and his strength: seek his face evermore.
kjv.PSA_105_5: Remember his marvellous works that he hath done; his wonders, and the judgments of his mouth;
kjv.PSA_105_6: O ye seed of Abraham his servant, ye children of Jacob his chosen.
kjv.PSA_105_7: He is the Lord our God: his judgments are in all the earth.
kjv.PSA_105_8: He hath remembered his covenant for ever, the word which he commanded to a thousand generations.
kjv.PSA_105_9: Which covenant he made with Abraham, and his oath unto Isaac;
kjv.PSA_105_10: And confirmed the same unto Jacob for a law, and to Israel for an everlasting covenant:
kjv.PSA_105_11: Saying, Unto thee will I give the land of Canaan, the lot of your inheritance:
kjv.PSA_105_12: When they were but a few men in number; yea, very few, and strangers in it.
kjv.PSA_105_13: When they went from one nation to another, from one kingdom to another people;
kjv.PSA_105_14: He suffered no man to do them wrong: yea, he reproved kings for their sakes;
kjv.PSA_105_15: Saying, Touch not mine anointed, and do my prophets no harm.
kjv.PSA_105_16: Moreover he called for a famine upon the land: he brake the whole staff of bread.
kjv.PSA_105_17: He sent a man before them, even Joseph, who was sold for a servant:
kjv.PSA_105_18: Whose feet they hurt with fetters: he was laid in iron:
kjv.PSA_105_19: Until the time that his word came: the word of the Lord tried him.
kjv.PSA_105_20: The king sent and loosed him; even the ruler of the people, and let him go free.
kjv.PSA_105_21: He made him lord of his house, and ruler of all his substance:
kjv.PSA_105_22: To bind his princes at his pleasure; and teach his senators wisdom.
kjv.PSA_105_23: Israel also came into Egypt; and Jacob sojourned in the land of Ham.
kjv.PSA_105_24: And he increased his people greatly; and made them stronger than their enemies.
kjv.PSA_105_25: He turned their heart to hate his people, to deal subtilly with his servants.
kjv.PSA_105_26: He sent Moses his servant; and Aaron whom he had chosen.
kjv.PSA_105_27: They shewed his signs among them, and wonders in the land of Ham.
kjv.PSA_105_28: He sent darkness, and made it dark; and they rebelled not against his word.
kjv.PSA_105_29: He turned their waters into blood, and slew their fish.
kjv.PSA_105_30: Their land brought forth frogs in abundance, in the chambers of their kings.
kjv.PSA_105_31: He spake, and there came divers sorts of flies, and lice in all their coasts.
kjv.PSA_105_32: He gave them hail for rain, and flaming fire in their land.
kjv.PSA_105_33: He smote their vines also and their fig trees; and brake the trees of their coasts.
kjv.PSA_105_34: He spake, and the locusts came, and caterpillers, and that without number,
kjv.PSA_105_35: And did eat up all the herbs in their land, and devoured the fruit of their ground.
kjv.PSA_105_36: He smote also all the firstborn in their land, the chief of all their strength.
kjv.PSA_105_37: He brought them forth also with silver and gold: and there was not one feeble person among their tribes.
kjv.PSA_105_38: Egypt was glad when they departed: for the fear of them fell upon them.
kjv.PSA_105_39: He spread a cloud for a covering; and fire to give light in the night.
kjv.PSA_105_40: The people asked, and he brought quails, and satisfied them with the bread of heaven.
kjv.PSA_105_41: He opened the rock, and the waters gushed out; they ran in the dry places like a river.
kjv.PSA_105_42: For he remembered his holy promise, and Abraham his servant.
kjv.PSA_105_43: And he brought forth his people with joy, and his chosen with gladness:
kjv.PSA_105_44: And gave them the lands of the heathen: and they inherited the labour of the people;
kjv.PSA_105_45: That they might observe his statutes, and keep his laws. Praise ye the Lord.
kjv.PSA_106_1: Praise ye the Lord. O give thanks unto the Lord; for he is good: for his mercy endureth for ever.
kjv.PSA_106_2: Who can utter the mighty acts of the Lord? who can shew forth all his praise?
kjv.PSA_106_3: Blessed are they that keep judgment, and he that doeth righteousness at all times.
kjv.PSA_106_4: Remember me, O Lord, with the favour that thou bearest unto thy people: O visit me with thy salvation;
kjv.PSA_106_5: That I may see the good of thy chosen, that I may rejoice in the gladness of thy nation, that I may glory with thine inheritance.
kjv.PSA_106_6: We have sinned with our fathers, we have committed iniquity, we have done wickedly.
kjv.PSA_106_7: Our fathers understood not thy wonders in Egypt; they remembered not the multitude of thy mercies; but provoked him at the sea, even at the Red sea.
kjv.PSA_106_8: Nevertheless he saved them for his name's sake, that he might make his mighty power to be known.
kjv.PSA_106_9: He rebuked the Red sea also, and it was dried up: so he led them through the depths, as through the wilderness.
kjv.PSA_106_10: And he saved them from the hand of him that hated them, and redeemed them from the hand of the enemy.
kjv.PSA_106_11: And the waters covered their enemies: there was not one of them left.
kjv.PSA_106_12: Then believed they his words; they sang his praise.
kjv.PSA_106_13: They soon forgat his works; they waited not for his counsel:
kjv.PSA_106_14: But lusted exceedingly in the wilderness, and tempted God in the desert.
kjv.PSA_106_15: And he gave them their request; but sent leanness into their soul.
kjv.PSA_106_16: They envied Moses also in the camp, and Aaron the saint of the Lord.
kjv.PSA_106_17: The earth opened and swallowed up Dathan and covered the company of Abiram.
kjv.PSA_106_18: And a fire was kindled in their company; the flame burned up the wicked.
kjv.PSA_106_19: They made a calf in Horeb, and worshipped the molten image.
kjv.PSA_106_20: Thus they changed their glory into the similitude of an ox that eateth grass.
kjv.PSA_106_21: They forgat God their saviour, which had done great things in Egypt;
kjv.PSA_106_22: Wondrous works in the land of Ham, and terrible things by the Red sea.
kjv.PSA_106_23: Therefore he said that he would destroy them, had not Moses his chosen stood before him in the breach, to turn away his wrath, lest he should destroy them.
kjv.PSA_106_24: Yea, they despised the pleasant land, they believed not his word:
kjv.PSA_106_25: But murmured in their tents, and hearkened not unto the voice of the Lord.
kjv.PSA_106_26: Therefore he lifted up his hand against them, to overthrow them in the wilderness:
kjv.PSA_106_27: To overthrow their seed also among the nations, and to scatter them in the lands.
kjv.PSA_106_28: They joined themselves also unto Baalpeor, and ate the sacrifices of the dead.
kjv.PSA_106_29: Thus they provoked him to anger with their inventions: and the plague brake in upon them.
kjv.PSA_106_30: Then stood up Phinehas, and executed judgment: and so the plague was stayed.
kjv.PSA_106_31: And that was counted unto him for righteousness unto all generations for evermore.
kjv.PSA_106_32: They angered him also at the waters of strife, so that it went ill with Moses for their sakes:
kjv.PSA_106_33: Because they provoked his spirit, so that he spake unadvisedly with his lips.
kjv.PSA_106_34: They did not destroy the nations, concerning whom the Lord commanded them:
kjv.PSA_106_35: But were mingled among the heathen, and learned their works.
kjv.PSA_106_36: And they served their idols: which were a snare unto them.
kjv.PSA_106_37: Yea, they sacrificed their sons and their daughters unto devils,
kjv.PSA_106_38: And shed innocent blood, even the blood of their sons and of their daughters, whom they sacrificed unto the idols of Canaan: and the land was polluted with blood.
kjv.PSA_106_39: Thus were they defiled with their own works, and went a whoring with their own inventions.
kjv.PSA_106_40: Therefore was the wrath of the Lord kindled against his people, insomuch that he abhorred his own inheritance.
kjv.PSA_106_41: And he gave them into the hand of the heathen; and they that hated them ruled over them.
kjv.PSA_106_42: Their enemies also oppressed them, and they were brought into subjection under their hand.
kjv.PSA_106_43: Many times did he deliver them; but they provoked him with their counsel, and were brought low for their iniquity.
kjv.PSA_106_44: Nevertheless he regarded their affliction, when he heard their cry:
kjv.PSA_106_45: And he remembered for them his covenant, and repented according to the multitude of his mercies.
kjv.PSA_106_46: He made them also to be pitied of all those that carried them captives.
kjv.PSA_106_47: Save us, O Lord our God, and gather us from among the heathen, to give thanks unto thy holy name, and to triumph in thy praise.
kjv.PSA_106_48: Blessed be the Lord God of Israel from everlasting to everlasting: and let all the people say, Amen. Praise ye the Lord.
kjv.PSA_107_1: O give thanks unto the Lord, for he is good: for his mercy endureth for ever.
kjv.PSA_107_2: Let the redeemed of the Lord say so, whom he hath redeemed from the hand of the enemy;
kjv.PSA_107_3: And gathered them out of the lands, from the east, and from the west, from the north, and from the south.
kjv.PSA_107_4: They wandered in the wilderness in a solitary way; they found no city to dwell in.
kjv.PSA_107_5: Hungry and thirsty, their soul fainted in them.
kjv.PSA_107_6: Then they cried unto the Lord in their trouble, and he delivered them out of their distresses.
kjv.PSA_107_7: And he led them forth by the right way, that they might go to a city of habitation.
kjv.PSA_107_8: Oh that men would praise the Lord for his goodness, and for his wonderful works to the children of men!
kjv.PSA_107_9: For he satisfieth the longing soul, and filleth the hungry soul with goodness.
kjv.PSA_107_10: Such as sit in darkness and in the shadow of death, being bound in affliction and iron;
kjv.PSA_107_11: Because they rebelled against the words of God, and contemned the counsel of the most High:
kjv.PSA_107_12: Therefore he brought down their heart with labour; they fell down, and there was none to help.
kjv.PSA_107_13: Then they cried unto the Lord in their trouble, and he saved them out of their distresses.
kjv.PSA_107_14: He brought them out of darkness and the shadow of death, and brake their bands in sunder.
kjv.PSA_107_15: Oh that men would praise the Lord for his goodness, and for his wonderful works to the children of men!
kjv.PSA_107_16: For he hath broken the gates of brass, and cut the bars of iron in sunder.
kjv.PSA_107_17: Fools because of their transgression, and because of their iniquities, are afflicted.
kjv.PSA_107_18: Their soul abhorreth all manner of meat; and they draw near unto the gates of death.
kjv.PSA_107_19: Then they cry unto the Lord in their trouble, and he saveth them out of their distresses.
kjv.PSA_107_20: He sent his word, and healed them, and delivered them from their destructions.
kjv.PSA_107_21: Oh that men would praise the Lord for his goodness, and for his wonderful works to the children of men!
kjv.PSA_107_22: And let them sacrifice the sacrifices of thanksgiving, and declare his works with rejoicing.
kjv.PSA_107_23: They that go down to the sea in ships, that do business in great waters;
kjv.PSA_107_24: These see the works of the Lord, and his wonders in the deep.
kjv.PSA_107_25: For he commandeth, and raiseth the stormy wind, which lifteth up the waves thereof.
kjv.PSA_107_26: They mount up to the heaven, they go down again to the depths: their soul is melted because of trouble.
kjv.PSA_107_27: They reel to and fro, and stagger like a drunken man, and are at their wit's end.
kjv.PSA_107_28: Then they cry unto the Lord in their trouble, and he bringeth them out of their distresses.
kjv.PSA_107_29: He maketh the storm a calm, so that the waves thereof are still.
kjv.PSA_107_30: Then are they glad because they be quiet; so he bringeth them unto their desired haven.
kjv.PSA_107_31: Oh that men would praise the Lord for his goodness, and for his wonderful works to the children of men!
kjv.PSA_107_32: Let them exalt him also in the congregation of the people, and praise him in the assembly of the elders.
kjv.PSA_107_33: He turneth rivers into a wilderness, and the watersprings into dry ground;
kjv.PSA_107_34: A fruitful land into barrenness, for the wickedness of them that dwell therein.
kjv.PSA_107_35: He turneth the wilderness into a standing water, and dry ground into watersprings.
kjv.PSA_107_36: And there he maketh the hungry to dwell, that they may prepare a city for habitation;
kjv.PSA_107_37: And sow the fields, and plant vineyards, which may yield fruits of increase.
kjv.PSA_107_38: He blesseth them also, so that they are multiplied greatly; and suffereth not their cattle to decrease.
kjv.PSA_107_39: Again, they are minished and brought low through oppression, affliction, and sorrow.
kjv.PSA_107_40: He poureth contempt upon princes, and causeth them to wander in the wilderness, where there is no way.
kjv.PSA_107_41: Yet setteth he the poor on high from affliction, and maketh him families like a flock.
kjv.PSA_107_42: The righteous shall see it, and rejoice: and all iniquity shall stop her mouth.
kjv.PSA_107_43: Whoso is wise, and will observe these things, even they shall understand the lovingkindness of the Lord.
kjv.PSA_108_1: O God, my heart is fixed; I will sing and give praise, even with my glory.
kjv.PSA_108_2: Awake, psaltery and harp: I myself will awake early.
kjv.PSA_108_3: I will praise thee, O Lord, among the people: and I will sing praises unto thee among the nations.
kjv.PSA_108_4: For thy mercy is great above the heavens: and thy truth reacheth unto the clouds.
kjv.PSA_108_5: Be thou exalted, O God, above the heavens: and thy glory above all the earth;
kjv.PSA_108_6: That thy beloved may be delivered: save with thy right hand, and answer me.
kjv.PSA_108_7: God hath spoken in his holiness; I will rejoice, I will divide Shechem, and mete out the valley of Succoth.
kjv.PSA_108_8: Gilead is mine; Manasseh is mine; Ephraim also is the strength of mine head; Judah is my lawgiver;
kjv.PSA_108_9: Moab is my washpot; over Edom will I cast out my shoe; over Philistia will I triumph.
kjv.PSA_108_10: Who will bring me into the strong city? who will lead me into Edom?
kjv.PSA_108_11: Wilt not thou, O God, who hast cast us off? and wilt not thou, O God, go forth with our hosts?
kjv.PSA_108_12: Give us help from trouble: for vain is the help of man.
kjv.PSA_108_13: Through God we shall do valiantly: for he it is that shall tread down our enemies.
kjv.PSA_109_1: Hold not thy peace, O God of my praise;
kjv.PSA_109_2: For the mouth of the wicked and the mouth of the deceitful are opened against me: they have spoken against me with a lying tongue.
kjv.PSA_109_3: They compassed me about also with words of hatred; and fought against me without a cause.
kjv.PSA_109_4: For my love they are my adversaries: but I give myself unto prayer.
kjv.PSA_109_5: And they have rewarded me evil for good, and hatred for my love.
kjv.PSA_109_6: Set thou a wicked man over him: and let Satan stand at his right hand.
kjv.PSA_109_7: When he shall be judged, let him be condemned: and let his prayer become sin.
kjv.PSA_109_8: Let his days be few; and let another take his office.
kjv.PSA_109_9: Let his children be fatherless, and his wife a widow.
kjv.PSA_109_10: Let his children be continually vagabonds, and beg: let them seek their bread also out of their desolate places.
kjv.PSA_109_11: Let the extortioner catch all that he hath; and let the strangers spoil his labour.
kjv.PSA_109_12: Let there be none to extend mercy unto him: neither let there be any to favour his fatherless children.
kjv.PSA_109_13: Let his posterity be cut off; and in the generation following let their name be blotted out.
kjv.PSA_109_14: Let the iniquity of his fathers be remembered with the Lord; and let not the sin of his mother be blotted out.
kjv.PSA_109_15: Let them be before the Lord continually, that he may cut off the memory of them from the earth.
kjv.PSA_109_16: Because that he remembered not to shew mercy, but persecuted the poor and needy man, that he might even slay the broken in heart.
kjv.PSA_109_17: As he loved cursing, so let it come unto him: as he delighted not in blessing, so let it be far from him.
kjv.PSA_109_18: As he clothed himself with cursing like as with his garment, so let it come into his bowels like water, and like oil into his bones.
kjv.PSA_109_19: Let it be unto him as the garment which covereth him, and for a girdle wherewith he is girded continually.
kjv.PSA_109_20: Let this be the reward of mine adversaries from the Lord, and of them that speak evil against my soul.
kjv.PSA_109_21: But do thou for me, O God the Lord, for thy name's sake: because thy mercy is good, deliver thou me.
kjv.PSA_109_22: For I am poor and needy, and my heart is wounded within me.
kjv.PSA_109_23: I am gone like the shadow when it declineth: I am tossed up and down as the locust.
kjv.PSA_109_24: My knees are weak through fasting; and my flesh faileth of fatness.
kjv.PSA_109_25: I became also a reproach unto them: when they looked upon me they shaked their heads.
kjv.PSA_109_26: Help me, O Lord my God: O save me according to thy mercy:
kjv.PSA_109_27: That they may know that this is thy hand; that thou, Lord, hast done it.
kjv.PSA_109_28: Let them curse, but bless thou: when they arise, let them be ashamed; but let thy servant rejoice.
kjv.PSA_109_29: Let mine adversaries be clothed with shame, and let them cover themselves with their own confusion, as with a mantle.
kjv.PSA_109_30: I will greatly praise the Lord with my mouth; yea, I will praise him among the multitude.
kjv.PSA_109_31: For he shall stand at the right hand of the poor, to save him from those that condemn his soul.
kjv.PSA_110_1: The Lord said unto my Lord, Sit thou at my right hand, until I make thine enemies thy footstool.
kjv.PSA_110_2: The Lord shall send the rod of thy strength out of Zion: rule thou in the midst of thine enemies.
kjv.PSA_110_3: Thy people shall be willing in the day of thy power, in the beauties of holiness from the womb of the morning: thou hast the dew of thy youth.
kjv.PSA_110_4: The Lord hath sworn, and will not repent, Thou art a priest for ever after the order of Melchizedek.
kjv.PSA_110_5: The Lord at thy right hand shall strike through kings in the day of his wrath.
kjv.PSA_110_6: He shall judge among the heathen, he shall fill the places with the dead bodies; he shall wound the heads over many countries.
kjv.PSA_110_7: He shall drink of the brook in the way: therefore shall he lift up the head.
kjv.PSA_111_1: Praise ye the Lord. I will praise the Lord with my whole heart, in the assembly of the upright, and in the congregation.
kjv.PSA_111_2: The works of the Lord are great, sought out of all them that have pleasure therein.
kjv.PSA_111_3: His work is honourable and glorious: and his righteousness endureth for ever.
kjv.PSA_111_4: He hath made his wonderful works to be remembered: the Lord is gracious and full of compassion.
kjv.PSA_111_5: He hath given meat unto them that fear him: he will ever be mindful of his covenant.
kjv.PSA_111_6: He hath shewed his people the power of his works, that he may give them the heritage of the heathen.
kjv.PSA_111_7: The works of his hands are verity and judgment; all his commandments are sure.
kjv.PSA_111_8: They stand fast for ever and ever, and are done in truth and uprightness.
kjv.PSA_111_9: He sent redemption unto his people: he hath commanded his covenant for ever: holy and reverend is his name.
kjv.PSA_111_10: The fear of the Lord is the beginning of wisdom: a good understanding have all they that do his commandments: his praise endureth for ever.
kjv.PSA_112_1: Praise ye the Lord. Blessed is the man that feareth the Lord, that delighteth greatly in his commandments.
kjv.PSA_112_2: His seed shall be mighty upon earth: the generation of the upright shall be blessed.
kjv.PSA_112_3: Wealth and riches shall be in his house: and his righteousness endureth for ever.
kjv.PSA_112_4: Unto the upright there ariseth light in the darkness: he is gracious, and full of compassion, and righteous.
kjv.PSA_112_5: A good man sheweth favour, and lendeth: he will guide his affairs with discretion.
kjv.PSA_112_6: Surely he shall not be moved for ever: the righteous shall be in everlasting remembrance.
kjv.PSA_112_7: He shall not be afraid of evil tidings: his heart is fixed, trusting in the Lord.
kjv.PSA_112_8: His heart is established, he shall not be afraid, until he see his desire upon his enemies.
kjv.PSA_112_9: He hath dispersed, he hath given to the poor; his righteousness endureth for ever; his horn shall be exalted with honour.
kjv.PSA_112_10: The wicked shall see it, and be grieved; he shall gnash with his teeth, and melt away: the desire of the wicked shall perish.
kjv.PSA_113_1: Praise ye the Lord. Praise, O ye servants of the Lord, praise the name of the Lord.
kjv.PSA_113_2: Blessed be the name of the Lord from this time forth and for evermore.
kjv.PSA_113_3: From the rising of the sun unto the going down of the same the Lord's name is to be praised.
kjv.PSA_113_4: The Lord is high above all nations, and his glory above the heavens.
kjv.PSA_113_5: Who is like unto the Lord our God, who dwelleth on high,
kjv.PSA_113_6: Who humbleth himself to behold the things that are in heaven, and in the earth!
kjv.PSA_113_7: He raiseth up the poor out of the dust, and lifteth the needy out of the dunghill;
kjv.PSA_113_8: That he may set him with princes, even with the princes of his people.
kjv.PSA_113_9: He maketh the barren woman to keep house, and to be a joyful mother of children. Praise ye the Lord.
kjv.PSA_114_1: When Israel went out of Egypt, the house of Jacob from a people of strange language;
kjv.PSA_114_2: Judah was his sanctuary, and Israel his dominion.
kjv.PSA_114_3: The sea saw it, and fled: Jordan was driven back.
kjv.PSA_114_4: The mountains skipped like rams, and the little hills like lambs.
kjv.PSA_114_5: What ailed thee, O thou sea, that thou fleddest? thou Jordan, that thou wast driven back?
kjv.PSA_114_6: Ye mountains, that ye skipped like rams; and ye little hills, like lambs?
kjv.PSA_114_7: Tremble, thou earth, at the presence of the Lord, at the presence of the God of Jacob;
kjv.PSA_114_8: Which turned the rock into a standing water, the flint into a fountain of waters.
kjv.PSA_115_1: Not unto us, O Lord, not unto us, but unto thy name give glory, for thy mercy, and for thy truth's sake.
kjv.PSA_115_2: Wherefore should the heathen say, Where is now their God?
kjv.PSA_115_3: But our God is in the heavens: he hath done whatsoever he hath pleased.
kjv.PSA_115_4: Their idols are silver and gold, the work of men's hands.
kjv.PSA_115_5: They have mouths, but they speak not: eyes have they, but they see not:
kjv.PSA_115_6: They have ears, but they hear not: noses have they, but they smell not:
kjv.PSA_115_7: They have hands, but they handle not: feet have they, but they walk not: neither speak they through their throat.
kjv.PSA_115_8: They that make them are like unto them; so is every one that trusteth in them.
kjv.PSA_115_9: O Israel, trust thou in the Lord: he is their help and their shield.
kjv.PSA_115_10: O house of Aaron, trust in the Lord: he is their help and their shield.
kjv.PSA_115_11: Ye that fear the Lord, trust in the Lord: he is their help and their shield.
kjv.PSA_115_12: The Lord hath been mindful of us: he will bless us; he will bless the house of Israel; he will bless the house of Aaron.
kjv.PSA_115_13: He will bless them that fear the Lord, both small and great.
kjv.PSA_115_14: The Lord shall increase you more and more, you and your children.
kjv.PSA_115_15: Ye are blessed of the Lord which made heaven and earth.
kjv.PSA_115_16: The heaven, even the heavens, are the Lord's: but the earth hath he given to the children of men.
kjv.PSA_115_17: The dead praise not the Lord, neither any that go down into silence.
kjv.PSA_115_18: But we will bless the Lord from this time forth and for evermore. Praise the Lord.
kjv.PSA_116_1: I love the Lord, because he hath heard my voice and my supplications.
kjv.PSA_116_2: Because he hath inclined his ear unto me, therefore will I call upon him as long as I live.
kjv.PSA_116_3: The sorrows of death compassed me, and the pains of hell gat hold upon me: I found trouble and sorrow.
kjv.PSA_116_4: Then called I upon the name of the Lord; O Lord, I beseech thee, deliver my soul.
kjv.PSA_116_5: Gracious is the Lord, and righteous; yea, our God is merciful.
kjv.PSA_116_6: The Lord preserveth the simple: I was brought low, and he helped me.
kjv.PSA_116_7: Return unto thy rest, O my soul; for the Lord hath dealt bountifully with thee.
kjv.PSA_116_8: For thou hast delivered my soul from death, mine eyes from tears, and my feet from falling.
kjv.PSA_116_9: I will walk before the Lord in the land of the living.
kjv.PSA_116_10: I believed, therefore have I spoken: I was greatly afflicted:
kjv.PSA_116_11: I said in my haste, All men are liars.
kjv.PSA_116_12: What shall I render unto the Lord for all his benefits toward me?
kjv.PSA_116_13: I will take the cup of salvation, and call upon the name of the Lord.
kjv.PSA_116_14: I will pay my vows unto the Lord now in the presence of all his people.
kjv.PSA_116_15: Precious in the sight of the Lord is the death of his saints.
kjv.PSA_116_16: O Lord, truly I am thy servant; I am thy servant, and the son of thine handmaid: thou hast loosed my bonds.
kjv.PSA_116_17: I will offer to thee the sacrifice of thanksgiving, and will call upon the name of the Lord.
kjv.PSA_116_18: I will pay my vows unto the Lord now in the presence of all his people.
kjv.PSA_116_19: In the courts of the Lord's house, in the midst of thee, O Jerusalem. Praise ye the Lord.
kjv.PSA_117_1: O praise the Lord, all ye nations: praise him, all ye people.
kjv.PSA_117_2: For his merciful kindness is great toward us: and the truth of the Lord endureth for ever. Praise ye the Lord.
kjv.PSA_118_1: O give thanks unto the Lord; for he is good: because his mercy endureth for ever.
kjv.PSA_118_2: Let Israel now say, that his mercy endureth for ever.
kjv.PSA_118_3: Let the house of Aaron now say, that his mercy endureth for ever.
kjv.PSA_118_4: Let them now that fear the Lord say, that his mercy endureth for ever.
kjv.PSA_118_5: I called upon the Lord in distress: the Lord answered me, and set me in a large place.
kjv.PSA_118_6: The Lord is on my side; I will not fear: what can man do unto me?
kjv.PSA_118_7: The Lord taketh my part with them that help me: therefore shall I see my desire upon them that hate me.
kjv.PSA_118_8: It is better to trust in the Lord than to put confidence in man.
kjv.PSA_118_9: It is better to trust in the Lord than to put confidence in princes.
kjv.PSA_118_10: All nations compassed me about: but in the name of the Lord will I destroy them.
kjv.PSA_118_11: They compassed me about; yea, they compassed me about: but in the name of the Lord I will destroy them.
kjv.PSA_118_12: They compassed me about like bees: they are quenched as the fire of thorns: for in the name of the Lord I will destroy them.
kjv.PSA_118_13: Thou hast thrust sore at me that I might fall: but the Lord helped me.
kjv.PSA_118_14: The Lord is my strength and song, and is become my salvation.
kjv.PSA_118_15: The voice of rejoicing and salvation is in the tabernacles of the righteous: the right hand of the Lord doeth valiantly.
kjv.PSA_118_16: The right hand of the Lord is exalted: the right hand of the Lord doeth valiantly.
kjv.PSA_118_17: I shall not die, but live, and declare the works of the Lord.
kjv.PSA_118_18: The Lord hath chastened me sore: but he hath not given me over unto death.
kjv.PSA_118_19: Open to me the gates of righteousness: I will go into them, and I will praise the Lord:
kjv.PSA_118_20: This gate of the Lord, into which the righteous shall enter.
kjv.PSA_118_21: I will praise thee: for thou hast heard me, and art become my salvation.
kjv.PSA_118_22: The stone which the builders refused is become the head stone of the corner.
kjv.PSA_118_23: This is the Lord's doing; it is marvellous in our eyes.
kjv.PSA_118_24: This is the day which the Lord hath made; we will rejoice and be glad in it.
kjv.PSA_118_25: Save now, I beseech thee, O Lord: O Lord, I beseech thee, send now prosperity.
kjv.PSA_118_26: Blessed be he that cometh in the name of the Lord: we have blessed you out of the house of the Lord.
kjv.PSA_118_27: God is the Lord, which hath shewed us light: bind the sacrifice with cords, even unto the horns of the altar.
kjv.PSA_118_28: Thou art my God, and I will praise thee: thou art my God, I will exalt thee.
kjv.PSA_118_29: O give thanks unto the Lord; for he is good: for his mercy endureth for ever.
kjv.PSA_119_1: Blessed are the undefiled in the way, who walk in the law of the Lord.
kjv.PSA_119_2: Blessed are they that keep his testimonies, and that seek him with the whole heart.
kjv.PSA_119_3: They also do no iniquity: they walk in his ways.
kjv.PSA_119_4: Thou hast commanded us to keep thy precepts diligently.
kjv.PSA_119_5: O that my ways were directed to keep thy statutes!
kjv.PSA_119_6: Then shall I not be ashamed, when I have respect unto all thy commandments.
kjv.PSA_119_7: I will praise thee with uprightness of heart, when I shall have learned thy righteous judgments.
kjv.PSA_119_8: I will keep thy statutes: O forsake me not utterly.
kjv.PSA_119_9: Wherewithal shall a young man cleanse his way? by taking heed thereto according to thy word.
kjv.PSA_119_10: With my whole heart have I sought thee: O let me not wander from thy commandments.
kjv.PSA_119_11: Thy word have I hid in mine heart, that I might not sin against thee.
kjv.PSA_119_12: Blessed art thou, O Lord: teach me thy statutes.
kjv.PSA_119_13: With my lips have I declared all the judgments of thy mouth.
kjv.PSA_119_14: I have rejoiced in the way of thy testimonies, as much as in all riches.
kjv.PSA_119_15: I will meditate in thy precepts, and have respect unto thy ways.
kjv.PSA_119_16: I will delight myself in thy statutes: I will not forget thy word.
kjv.PSA_119_17: Deal bountifully with thy servant, that I may live, and keep thy word.
kjv.PSA_119_18: Open thou mine eyes, that I may behold wondrous things out of thy law.
kjv.PSA_119_19: I am a stranger in the earth: hide not thy commandments from me.
kjv.PSA_119_20: My soul breaketh for the longing that it hath unto thy judgments at all times.
kjv.PSA_119_21: Thou hast rebuked the proud that are cursed, which do err from thy commandments.
kjv.PSA_119_22: Remove from me reproach and contempt; for I have kept thy testimonies.
kjv.PSA_119_23: Princes also did sit and speak against me: but thy servant did meditate in thy statutes.
kjv.PSA_119_24: Thy testimonies also are my delight and my counselors.
kjv.PSA_119_25: My soul cleaveth unto the dust: quicken thou me according to thy word.
kjv.PSA_119_26: I have declared my ways, and thou heardest me: teach me thy statutes.
kjv.PSA_119_27: Make me to understand the way of thy precepts: so shall I talk of thy wondrous works.
kjv.PSA_119_28: My soul melteth for heaviness: strengthen thou me according unto thy word.
kjv.PSA_119_29: Remove from me the way of lying: and grant me thy law graciously.
kjv.PSA_119_30: I have chosen the way of truth: thy judgments have I laid before me.
kjv.PSA_119_31: I have stuck unto thy testimonies: O Lord, put me not to shame.
kjv.PSA_119_32: I will run the way of thy commandments, when thou shalt enlarge my heart.
kjv.PSA_119_33: Teach me, O Lord, the way of thy statutes; and I shall keep it unto the end.
kjv.PSA_119_34: Give me understanding, and I shall keep thy law; yea, I shall observe it with my whole heart.
kjv.PSA_119_35: Make me to go in the path of thy commandments; for therein do I delight.
kjv.PSA_119_36: Incline my heart unto thy testimonies, and not to covetousness.
kjv.PSA_119_37: Turn away mine eyes from beholding vanity; and quicken thou me in thy way.
kjv.PSA_119_38: Stablish thy word unto thy servant, who is devoted to thy fear.
kjv.PSA_119_39: Turn away my reproach which I fear: for thy judgments are good.
kjv.PSA_119_40: Behold, I have longed after thy precepts: quicken me in thy righteousness.
kjv.PSA_119_41: Let thy mercies come also unto me, O Lord, even thy salvation, according to thy word.
kjv.PSA_119_42: So shall I have wherewith to answer him that reproacheth me: for I trust in thy word.
kjv.PSA_119_43: And take not the word of truth utterly out of my mouth; for I have hoped in thy judgments.
kjv.PSA_119_44: So shall I keep thy law continually for ever and ever.
kjv.PSA_119_45: And I will walk at liberty: for I seek thy precepts.
kjv.PSA_119_46: I will speak of thy testimonies also before kings, and will not be ashamed.
kjv.PSA_119_47: And I will delight myself in thy commandments, which I have loved.
kjv.PSA_119_48: My hands also will I lift up unto thy commandments, which I have loved; and I will meditate in thy statutes.
kjv.PSA_119_49: Remember the word unto thy servant, upon which thou hast caused me to hope.
kjv.PSA_119_50: This is my comfort in my affliction: for thy word hath quickened me.
kjv.PSA_119_51: The proud have had me greatly in derision: yet have I not declined from thy law.
kjv.PSA_119_52: I remembered thy judgments of old, O Lord; and have comforted myself.
kjv.PSA_119_53: Horror hath taken hold upon me because of the wicked that forsake thy law.
kjv.PSA_119_54: Thy statutes have been my songs in the house of my pilgrimage.
kjv.PSA_119_55: I have remembered thy name, O Lord, in the night, and have kept thy law.
kjv.PSA_119_56: This I had, because I kept thy precepts.
kjv.PSA_119_57: Thou art my portion, O Lord: I have said that I would keep thy words.
kjv.PSA_119_58: I intreated thy favour with my whole heart: be merciful unto me according to thy word.
kjv.PSA_119_59: I thought on my ways, and turned my feet unto thy testimonies.
kjv.PSA_119_60: I made haste, and delayed not to keep thy commandments.
kjv.PSA_119_61: The bands of the wicked have robbed me: but I have not forgotten thy law.
kjv.PSA_119_62: At midnight I will rise to give thanks unto thee because of thy righteous judgments.
kjv.PSA_119_63: I am a companion of all them that fear thee, and of them that keep thy precepts.
kjv.PSA_119_64: The earth, O Lord, is full of thy mercy: teach me thy statutes.
kjv.PSA_119_65: Thou hast dealt well with thy servant, O Lord, according unto thy word.
kjv.PSA_119_66: Teach me good judgment and knowledge: for I have believed thy commandments.
kjv.PSA_119_67: Before I was afflicted I went astray: but now have I kept thy word.
kjv.PSA_119_68: Thou art good, and doest good; teach me thy statutes.
kjv.PSA_119_69: The proud have forged a lie against me: but I will keep thy precepts with my whole heart.
kjv.PSA_119_70: Their heart is as fat as grease; but I delight in thy law.
kjv.PSA_119_71: It is good for me that I have been afflicted; that I might learn thy statutes.
kjv.PSA_119_72: The law of thy mouth is better unto me than thousands of gold and silver.
kjv.PSA_119_73: Thy hands have made me and fashioned me: give me understanding, that I may learn thy commandments.
kjv.PSA_119_74: They that fear thee will be glad when they see me; because I have hoped in thy word.
kjv.PSA_119_75: I know, O Lord, that thy judgments are right, and that thou in faithfulness hast afflicted me.
kjv.PSA_119_76: Let, I pray thee, thy merciful kindness be for my comfort, according to thy word unto thy servant.
kjv.PSA_119_77: Let thy tender mercies come unto me, that I may live: for thy law is my delight.
kjv.PSA_119_78: Let the proud be ashamed; for they dealt perversely with me without a cause: but I will meditate in thy precepts.
kjv.PSA_119_79: Let those that fear thee turn unto me, and those that have known thy testimonies.
kjv.PSA_119_80: Let my heart be sound in thy statutes; that I be not ashamed.
kjv.PSA_119_81: My soul fainteth for thy salvation: but I hope in thy word.
kjv.PSA_119_82: Mine eyes fail for thy word, saying, When wilt thou comfort me?
kjv.PSA_119_83: For I am become like a bottle in the smoke; yet do I not forget thy statutes.
kjv.PSA_119_84: How many are the days of thy servant? when wilt thou execute judgment on them that persecute me?
kjv.PSA_119_85: The proud have digged pits for me, which are not after thy law.
kjv.PSA_119_86: All thy commandments are faithful: they persecute me wrongfully; help thou me.
kjv.PSA_119_87: They had almost consumed me upon earth; but I forsook not thy precepts.
kjv.PSA_119_88: Quicken me after thy lovingkindness; so shall I keep the testimony of thy mouth.
kjv.PSA_119_89: For ever, O Lord, thy word is settled in heaven.
kjv.PSA_119_90: Thy faithfulness is unto all generations: thou hast established the earth, and it abideth.
kjv.PSA_119_91: They continue this day according to thine ordinances: for all are thy servants.
kjv.PSA_119_92: Unless thy law had been my delights, I should then have perished in mine affliction.
kjv.PSA_119_93: I will never forget thy precepts: for with them thou hast quickened me.
kjv.PSA_119_94: I am thine, save me: for I have sought thy precepts.
kjv.PSA_119_95: The wicked have waited for me to destroy me: but I will consider thy testimonies.
kjv.PSA_119_96: I have seen an end of all perfection: but thy commandment is exceeding broad.
kjv.PSA_119_97: O how love I thy law! it is my meditation all the day.
kjv.PSA_119_98: Thou through thy commandments hast made me wiser than mine enemies: for they are ever with me.
kjv.PSA_119_99: I have more understanding than all my teachers: for thy testimonies are my meditation.
kjv.PSA_119_100: I understand more than the ancients, because I keep thy precepts.
kjv.PSA_119_101: I have refrained my feet from every evil way, that I might keep thy word.
kjv.PSA_119_102: I have not departed from thy judgments: for thou hast taught me.
kjv.PSA_119_103: How sweet are thy words unto my taste! yea, sweeter than honey to my mouth!
kjv.PSA_119_104: Through thy precepts I get understanding: therefore I hate every false way.
kjv.PSA_119_105: Thy word is a lamp unto my feet, and a light unto my path.
kjv.PSA_119_106: I have sworn, and I will perform it, that I will keep thy righteous judgments.
kjv.PSA_119_107: I am afflicted very much: quicken me, O Lord, according unto thy word.
kjv.PSA_119_108: Accept, I beseech thee, the freewill offerings of my mouth, O Lord, and teach me thy judgments.
kjv.PSA_119_109: My soul is continually in my hand: yet do I not forget thy law.
kjv.PSA_119_110: The wicked have laid a snare for me: yet I erred not from thy precepts.
kjv.PSA_119_111: Thy testimonies have I taken as an heritage for ever: for they are the rejoicing of my heart.
kjv.PSA_119_112: I have inclined mine heart to perform thy statutes alway, even unto the end.
kjv.PSA_119_113: I hate vain thoughts: but thy law do I love.
kjv.PSA_119_114: Thou art my hiding place and my shield: I hope in thy word.
kjv.PSA_119_115: Depart from me, ye evildoers: for I will keep the commandments of my God.
kjv.PSA_119_116: Uphold me according unto thy word, that I may live: and let me not be ashamed of my hope.
kjv.PSA_119_117: Hold thou me up, and I shall be safe: and I will have respect unto thy statutes continually.
kjv.PSA_119_118: Thou hast trodden down all them that err from thy statutes: for their deceit is falsehood.
kjv.PSA_119_119: Thou puttest away all the wicked of the earth like dross: therefore I love thy testimonies.
kjv.PSA_119_120: My flesh trembleth for fear of thee; and I am afraid of thy judgments.
kjv.PSA_119_121: I have done judgment and justice: leave me not to mine oppressors.
kjv.PSA_119_122: Be surety for thy servant for good: let not the proud oppress me.
kjv.PSA_119_123: Mine eyes fail for thy salvation, and for the word of thy righteousness.
kjv.PSA_119_124: Deal with thy servant according unto thy mercy, and teach me thy statutes.
kjv.PSA_119_125: I am thy servant; give me understanding, that I may know thy testimonies.
kjv.PSA_119_126: It is time for thee, Lord, to work: for they have made void thy law.
kjv.PSA_119_127: Therefore I love thy commandments above gold; yea, above fine gold.
kjv.PSA_119_128: Therefore I esteem all thy precepts concerning all things to be right; and I hate every false way.
kjv.PSA_119_129: Thy testimonies are wonderful: therefore doth my soul keep them.
kjv.PSA_119_130: The entrance of thy words giveth light; it giveth understanding unto the simple.
kjv.PSA_119_131: I opened my mouth, and panted: for I longed for thy commandments.
kjv.PSA_119_132: Look thou upon me, and be merciful unto me, as thou usest to do unto those that love thy name.
kjv.PSA_119_133: Order my steps in thy word: and let not any iniquity have dominion over me.
kjv.PSA_119_134: Deliver me from the oppression of man: so will I keep thy precepts.
kjv.PSA_119_135: Make thy face to shine upon thy servant; and teach me thy statutes.
kjv.PSA_119_136: Rivers of waters run down mine eyes, because they keep not thy law.
kjv.PSA_119_137: Righteous art thou, O Lord, and upright are thy judgments.
kjv.PSA_119_138: Thy testimonies that thou hast commanded are righteous and very faithful.
kjv.PSA_119_139: My zeal hath consumed me, because mine enemies have forgotten thy words.
kjv.PSA_119_140: Thy word is very pure: therefore thy servant loveth it.
kjv.PSA_119_141: I am small and despised: yet do not I forget thy precepts.
kjv.PSA_119_142: Thy righteousness is an everlasting righteousness, and thy law is the truth.
kjv.PSA_119_143: Trouble and anguish have taken hold on me: yet thy commandments are my delights.
kjv.PSA_119_144: The righteousness of thy testimonies is everlasting: give me understanding, and I shall live.
kjv.PSA_119_145: I cried with my whole heart; hear me, O Lord: I will keep thy statutes.
kjv.PSA_119_146: I cried unto thee; save me, and I shall keep thy testimonies.
kjv.PSA_119_147: I prevented the dawning of the morning, and cried: I hoped in thy word.
kjv.PSA_119_148: Mine eyes prevent the night watches, that I might meditate in thy word.
kjv.PSA_119_149: Hear my voice according unto thy lovingkindness: O Lord, quicken me according to thy judgment.
kjv.PSA_119_150: They draw nigh that follow after mischief: they are far from thy law.
kjv.PSA_119_151: Thou art near, O Lord; and all thy commandments are truth.
kjv.PSA_119_152: Concerning thy testimonies, I have known of old that thou hast founded them for ever.
kjv.PSA_119_153: Consider mine affliction, and deliver me: for I do not forget thy law.
kjv.PSA_119_154: Plead my cause, and deliver me: quicken me according to thy word.
kjv.PSA_119_155: Salvation is far from the wicked: for they seek not thy statutes.
kjv.PSA_119_156: Great are thy tender mercies, O Lord: quicken me according to thy judgments.
kjv.PSA_119_157: Many are my persecutors and mine enemies; yet do I not decline from thy testimonies.
kjv.PSA_119_158: I beheld the transgressors, and was grieved; because they kept not thy word.
kjv.PSA_119_159: Consider how I love thy precepts: quicken me, O Lord, according to thy lovingkindness.
kjv.PSA_119_160: Thy word is true from the beginning: and every one of thy righteous judgments endureth for ever.
kjv.PSA_119_161: Princes have persecuted me without a cause: but my heart standeth in awe of thy word.
kjv.PSA_119_162: I rejoice at thy word, as one that findeth great spoil.
kjv.PSA_119_163: I hate and abhor lying: but thy law do I love.
kjv.PSA_119_164: Seven times a day do I praise thee because of thy righteous judgments.
kjv.PSA_119_165: Great peace have they which love thy law: and nothing shall offend them.
kjv.PSA_119_166: Lord, I have hoped for thy salvation, and done thy commandments.
kjv.PSA_119_167: My soul hath kept thy testimonies; and I love them exceedingly.
kjv.PSA_119_168: I have kept thy precepts and thy testimonies: for all my ways are before thee.
kjv.PSA_119_169: Let my cry come near before thee, O Lord: give me understanding according to thy word.
kjv.PSA_119_170: Let my supplication come before thee: deliver me according to thy word.
kjv.PSA_119_171: My lips shall utter praise, when thou hast taught me thy statutes.
kjv.PSA_119_172: My tongue shall speak of thy word: for all thy commandments are righteousness.
kjv.PSA_119_173: Let thine hand help me; for I have chosen thy precepts.
kjv.PSA_119_174: I have longed for thy salvation, O Lord; and thy law is my delight.
kjv.PSA_119_175: Let my soul live, and it shall praise thee; and let thy judgments help me.
kjv.PSA_119_176: I have gone astray like a lost sheep; seek thy servant; for I do not forget thy commandments.
kjv.PSA_120_1: In my distress I cried unto the Lord, and he heard me.
kjv.PSA_120_2: Deliver my soul, O Lord, from lying lips, and from a deceitful tongue.
kjv.PSA_120_3: What shall be given unto thee? or what shall be done unto thee, thou false tongue?
kjv.PSA_120_4: Sharp arrows of the mighty, with coals of juniper.
kjv.PSA_120_5: Woe is me, that I sojourn in Mesech, that I dwell in the tents of Kedar!
kjv.PSA_120_6: My soul hath long dwelt with him that hateth peace.
kjv.PSA_120_7: I am for peace: but when I speak, they are for war.
kjv.PSA_121_1: I will lift up mine eyes unto the hills, from whence cometh my help.
kjv.PSA_121_2: My help cometh from the Lord, which made heaven and earth.
kjv.PSA_121_3: He will not suffer thy foot to be moved: he that keepeth thee will not slumber.
kjv.PSA_121_4: Behold, he that keepeth Israel shall neither slumber nor sleep.
kjv.PSA_121_5: The Lord is thy keeper: the Lord is thy shade upon thy right hand.
kjv.PSA_121_6: The sun shall not smite thee by day, nor the moon by night.
kjv.PSA_121_7: The Lord shall preserve thee from all evil: he shall preserve thy soul.
kjv.PSA_121_8: The Lord shall preserve thy going out and thy coming in from this time forth, and even for evermore.
kjv.PSA_122_1: I was glad when they said unto me, Let us go into the house of the Lord.
kjv.PSA_122_2: Our feet shall stand within thy gates, O Jerusalem.
kjv.PSA_122_3: Jerusalem is builded as a city that is compact together:
kjv.PSA_122_4: Whither the tribes go up, the tribes of the Lord, unto the testimony of Israel, to give thanks unto the name of the Lord.
kjv.PSA_122_5: For there are set thrones of judgment, the thrones of the house of David.
kjv.PSA_122_6: Pray for the peace of Jerusalem: they shall prosper that love thee.
kjv.PSA_122_7: Peace be within thy walls, and prosperity within thy palaces.
kjv.PSA_122_8: For my brethren and companions' sakes, I will now say, Peace be within thee.
kjv.PSA_122_9: Because of the house of the Lord our God I will seek thy good.
kjv.PSA_123_1: Unto thee lift I up mine eyes, O thou that dwellest in the heavens.
kjv.PSA_123_2: Behold, as the eyes of servants look unto the hand of their masters, and as the eyes of a maiden unto the hand of her mistress; so our eyes wait upon the Lord our God, until that he have mercy upon us.
kjv.PSA_123_3: Have mercy upon us, O Lord, have mercy upon us: for we are exceedingly filled with contempt.
kjv.PSA_123_4: Our soul is exceedingly filled with the scorning of those that are at ease, and with the contempt of the proud.
kjv.PSA_124_1: If it had not been the Lord who was on our side, now may Israel say;
kjv.PSA_124_2: If it had not been the Lord who was on our side, when men rose up against us:
kjv.PSA_124_3: Then they had swallowed us up quick, when their wrath was kindled against us:
kjv.PSA_124_4: Then the waters had overwhelmed us, the stream had gone over our soul:
kjv.PSA_124_5: Then the proud waters had gone over our soul.
kjv.PSA_124_6: Blessed be the Lord, who hath not given us as a prey to their teeth.
kjv.PSA_124_7: Our soul is escaped as a bird out of the snare of the fowlers: the snare is broken, and we are escaped.
kjv.PSA_124_8: Our help is in the name of the Lord, who made heaven and earth.
kjv.PSA_125_1: They that trust in the Lord shall be as mount Zion, which cannot be removed, but abideth for ever.
kjv.PSA_125_2: As the mountains are round about Jerusalem, so the Lord is round about his people from henceforth even for ever.
kjv.PSA_125_3: For the rod of the wicked shall not rest upon the lot of the righteous; lest the righteous put forth their hands unto iniquity.
kjv.PSA_125_4: Do good, O Lord, unto those that be good, and to them that are upright in their hearts.
kjv.PSA_125_5: As for such as turn aside unto their crooked ways, the Lord shall lead them forth with the workers of iniquity: but peace shall be upon Israel.
kjv.PSA_126_1: When the Lord turned again the captivity of Zion, we were like them that dream.
kjv.PSA_126_2: Then was our mouth filled with laughter, and our tongue with singing: then said they among the heathen, The Lord hath done great things for them.
kjv.PSA_126_3: The Lord hath done great things for us; whereof we are glad.
kjv.PSA_126_4: Turn again our captivity, O Lord, as the streams in the south.
kjv.PSA_126_5: They that sow in tears shall reap in joy.
kjv.PSA_126_6: He that goeth forth and weepeth, bearing precious seed, shall doubtless come again with rejoicing, bringing his sheaves with him.
kjv.PSA_127_1: Except the Lord build the house, they labour in vain that build it: except the Lord keep the city, the watchman waketh but in vain.
kjv.PSA_127_2: It is vain for you to rise up early, to sit up late, to eat the bread of sorrows: for so he giveth his beloved sleep.
kjv.PSA_127_3: Lo, children are an heritage of the Lord: and the fruit of the womb is his reward.
kjv.PSA_127_4: As arrows are in the hand of a mighty man; so are children of the youth.
kjv.PSA_127_5: Happy is the man that hath his quiver full of them: they shall not be ashamed, but they shall speak with the enemies in the gate.
kjv.PSA_128_1: Blessed is every one that feareth the Lord; that walketh in his ways.
kjv.PSA_128_2: For thou shalt eat the labour of thine hands: happy shalt thou be, and it shall be well with thee.
kjv.PSA_128_3: Thy wife shall be as a fruitful vine by the sides of thine house: thy children like olive plants round about thy table.
kjv.PSA_128_4: Behold, that thus shall the man be blessed that feareth the Lord.
kjv.PSA_128_5: The Lord shall bless thee out of Zion: and thou shalt see the good of Jerusalem all the days of thy life.
kjv.PSA_128_6: Yea, thou shalt see thy children's children, and peace upon Israel.
kjv.PSA_129_1: Many a time have they afflicted me from my youth, may Israel now say:
kjv.PSA_129_2: Many a time have they afflicted me from my youth: yet they have not prevailed against me.
kjv.PSA_129_3: The plowers plowed upon my back: they made long their furrows.
kjv.PSA_129_4: The Lord is righteous: he hath cut asunder the cords of the wicked.
kjv.PSA_129_5: Let them all be confounded and turned back that hate Zion.
kjv.PSA_129_6: Let them be as the grass upon the housetops, which withereth afore it groweth up:
kjv.PSA_129_7: Wherewith the mower filleth not his hand; nor he that bindeth sheaves his bosom.
kjv.PSA_129_8: Neither do they which go by say, The blessing of the Lord be upon you: we bless you in the name of the Lord.
kjv.PSA_130_1: Out of the depths have I cried unto thee, O Lord.
kjv.PSA_130_2: Lord, hear my voice: let thine ears be attentive to the voice of my supplications.
kjv.PSA_130_3: If thou, Lord, shouldest mark iniquities, O Lord, who shall stand?
kjv.PSA_130_4: But there is forgiveness with thee, that thou mayest be feared.
kjv.PSA_130_5: I wait for the Lord, my soul doth wait, and in his word do I hope.
kjv.PSA_130_6: My soul waiteth for the Lord more than they that watch for the morning: I say, more than they that watch for the morning.
kjv.PSA_130_7: Let Israel hope in the Lord: for with the Lord there is mercy, and with him is plenteous redemption.
kjv.PSA_130_8: And he shall redeem Israel from all his iniquities.
kjv.PSA_131_1: Lord, my heart is not haughty, nor mine eyes lofty: neither do I exercise myself in great matters, or in things too high for me.
kjv.PSA_131_2: Surely I have behaved and quieted myself, as a child that is weaned of his mother: my soul is even as a weaned child.
kjv.PSA_131_3: Let Israel hope in the Lord from henceforth and for ever.
kjv.PSA_132_1: Lord, remember David, and all his afflictions:
kjv.PSA_132_2: How he sware unto the Lord, and vowed unto the mighty God of Jacob;
kjv.PSA_132_3: Surely I will not come into the tabernacle of my house, nor go up into my bed;
kjv.PSA_132_4: I will not give sleep to mine eyes, or slumber to mine eyelids,
kjv.PSA_132_5: Until I find out a place for the Lord, an habitation for the mighty God of Jacob.
kjv.PSA_132_6: Lo, we heard of it at Ephratah: we found it in the fields of the wood.
kjv.PSA_132_7: We will go into his tabernacles: we will worship at his footstool.
kjv.PSA_132_8: Arise, O Lord, into thy rest; thou, and the ark of thy strength.
kjv.PSA_132_9: Let thy priests be clothed with righteousness; and let thy saints shout for joy.
kjv.PSA_132_10: For thy servant David's sake turn not away the face of thine anointed.
kjv.PSA_132_11: The Lord hath sworn in truth unto David; he will not turn from it; Of the fruit of thy body will I set upon thy throne.
kjv.PSA_132_12: If thy children will keep my covenant and my testimony that I shall teach them, their children shall also sit upon thy throne for evermore.
kjv.PSA_132_13: For the Lord hath chosen Zion; he hath desired it for his habitation.
kjv.PSA_132_14: This is my rest for ever: here will I dwell; for I have desired it.
kjv.PSA_132_15: I will abundantly bless her provision: I will satisfy her poor with bread.
kjv.PSA_132_16: I will also clothe her priests with salvation: and her saints shall shout aloud for joy.
kjv.PSA_132_17: There will I make the horn of David to bud: I have ordained a lamp for mine anointed.
kjv.PSA_132_18: His enemies will I clothe with shame: but upon himself shall his crown flourish.
kjv.PSA_133_1: Behold, how good and how pleasant it is for brethren to dwell together in unity!
kjv.PSA_133_2: It is like the precious ointment upon the head, that ran down upon the beard, even Aaron's beard: that went down to the skirts of his garments;
kjv.PSA_133_3: As the dew of Hermon, and as the dew that descended upon the mountains of Zion: for there the Lord commanded the blessing, even life for evermore.
kjv.PSA_134_1: Behold, bless ye the Lord, all ye servants of the Lord, which by night stand in the house of the Lord.
kjv.PSA_134_2: Lift up your hands in the sanctuary, and bless the Lord.
kjv.PSA_134_3: The Lord that made heaven and earth bless thee out of Zion.
kjv.PSA_135_1: Praise ye the Lord. Praise ye the name of the Lord; praise him, O ye servants of the Lord.
kjv.PSA_135_2: Ye that stand in the house of the Lord, in the courts of the house of our God.
kjv.PSA_135_3: Praise the Lord; for the Lord is good: sing praises unto his name; for it is pleasant.
kjv.PSA_135_4: For the Lord hath chosen Jacob unto himself, and Israel for his peculiar treasure.
kjv.PSA_135_5: For I know that the Lord is great, and that our Lord is above all gods.
kjv.PSA_135_6: Whatsoever the Lord pleased, that did he in heaven, and in earth, in the seas, and all deep places.
kjv.PSA_135_7: He causeth the vapours to ascend from the ends of the earth; he maketh lightnings for the rain; he bringeth the wind out of his treasuries.
kjv.PSA_135_8: Who smote the firstborn of Egypt, both of man and beast.
kjv.PSA_135_9: Who sent tokens and wonders into the midst of thee, O Egypt, upon Pharaoh, and upon all his servants.
kjv.PSA_135_10: Who smote great nations, and slew mighty kings;
kjv.PSA_135_11: Sihon king of the Amorites, and Og king of Bashan, and all the kingdoms of Canaan:
kjv.PSA_135_12: And gave their land for an heritage, an heritage unto Israel his people.
kjv.PSA_135_13: Thy name, O Lord, endureth for ever; and thy memorial, O Lord, throughout all generations.
kjv.PSA_135_14: For the Lord will judge his people, and he will repent himself concerning his servants.
kjv.PSA_135_15: The idols of the heathen are silver and gold, the work of men's hands.
kjv.PSA_135_16: They have mouths, but they speak not; eyes have they, but they see not;
kjv.PSA_135_17: They have ears, but they hear not; neither is there any breath in their mouths.
kjv.PSA_135_18: They that make them are like unto them: so is every one that trusteth in them.
kjv.PSA_135_19: Bless the Lord, O house of Israel: bless the Lord, O house of Aaron:
kjv.PSA_135_20: Bless the Lord, O house of Levi: ye that fear the Lord, bless the Lord.
kjv.PSA_135_21: Blessed be the Lord out of Zion, which dwelleth at Jerusalem. Praise ye the Lord.
kjv.PSA_136_1: O give thanks unto the Lord; for he is good: for his mercy endureth for ever.
kjv.PSA_136_2: O give thanks unto the God of gods: for his mercy endureth for ever.
kjv.PSA_136_3: O give thanks to the Lord of lords: for his mercy endureth for ever.
kjv.PSA_136_4: To him who alone doeth great wonders: for his mercy endureth for ever.
kjv.PSA_136_5: To him that by wisdom made the heavens: for his mercy endureth for ever.
kjv.PSA_136_6: To him that stretched out the earth above the waters: for his mercy endureth for ever.
kjv.PSA_136_7: To him that made great lights: for his mercy endureth for ever:
kjv.PSA_136_8: The sun to rule by day: for his mercy endureth for ever:
kjv.PSA_136_9: The moon and stars to rule by night: for his mercy endureth for ever.
kjv.PSA_136_10: To him that smote Egypt in their firstborn: for his mercy endureth for ever:
kjv.PSA_136_11: And brought out Israel from among them: for his mercy endureth for ever:
kjv.PSA_136_12: With a strong hand, and with a stretched out arm: for his mercy endureth for ever.
kjv.PSA_136_13: To him which divided the Red sea into parts: for his mercy endureth for ever:
kjv.PSA_136_14: And made Israel to pass through the midst of it: for his mercy endureth for ever:
kjv.PSA_136_15: But overthrew Pharaoh and his host in the Red sea: for his mercy endureth for ever.
kjv.PSA_136_16: To him which led his people through the wilderness: for his mercy endureth for ever.
kjv.PSA_136_17: To him which smote great kings: for his mercy endureth for ever:
kjv.PSA_136_18: And slew famous kings: for his mercy endureth for ever:
kjv.PSA_136_19: Sihon king of the Amorites: for his mercy endureth for ever:
kjv.PSA_136_20: And Og the king of Bashan: for his mercy endureth for ever:
kjv.PSA_136_21: And gave their land for an heritage: for his mercy endureth for ever:
kjv.PSA_136_22: Even an heritage unto Israel his servant: for his mercy endureth for ever.
kjv.PSA_136_23: Who remembered us in our low estate: for his mercy endureth for ever:
kjv.PSA_136_24: And hath redeemed us from our enemies: for his mercy endureth for ever.
kjv.PSA_136_25: Who giveth food to all flesh: for his mercy endureth for ever.
kjv.PSA_136_26: O give thanks unto the God of heaven: for his mercy endureth for ever.
kjv.PSA_137_1: By the rivers of Babylon, there we sat down, yea, we wept, when we remembered Zion.
kjv.PSA_137_2: We hanged our harps upon the willows in the midst thereof.
kjv.PSA_137_3: For there they that carried us away captive required of us a song; and they that wasted us required of us mirth, saying, Sing us one of the songs of Zion.
kjv.PSA_137_4: How shall we sing the Lord's song in a strange land?
kjv.PSA_137_5: If I forget thee, O Jerusalem, let my right hand forget her cunning.
kjv.PSA_137_6: If I do not remember thee, let my tongue cleave to the roof of my mouth; if I prefer not Jerusalem above my chief joy.
kjv.PSA_137_7: Remember, O Lord, the children of Edom in the day of Jerusalem; who said, Rase it, rase it, even to the foundation thereof.
kjv.PSA_137_8: O daughter of Babylon, who art to be destroyed; happy shall he be, that rewardeth thee as thou hast served us.
kjv.PSA_137_9: Happy shall he be, that taketh and dasheth thy little ones against the stones.
kjv.PSA_138_1: I will praise thee with my whole heart: before the gods will I sing praise unto thee.
kjv.PSA_138_2: I will worship toward thy holy temple, and praise thy name for thy lovingkindness and for thy truth: for thou hast magnified thy word above all thy name.
kjv.PSA_138_3: In the day when I cried thou answeredst me, and strengthenedst me with strength in my soul.
kjv.PSA_138_4: All the kings of the earth shall praise thee, O Lord, when they hear the words of thy mouth.
kjv.PSA_138_5: Yea, they shall sing in the ways of the Lord: for great is the glory of the Lord.
kjv.PSA_138_6: Though the Lord be high, yet hath he respect unto the lowly: but the proud he knoweth afar off.
kjv.PSA_138_7: Though I walk in the midst of trouble, thou wilt revive me: thou shalt stretch forth thine hand against the wrath of mine enemies, and thy right hand shall save me.
kjv.PSA_138_8: The Lord will perfect that which concerneth me: thy mercy, O Lord, endureth for ever: forsake not the works of thine own hands.
kjv.PSA_139_1: O lord, thou hast searched me, and known me.
kjv.PSA_139_2: Thou knowest my downsitting and mine uprising, thou understandest my thought afar off.
kjv.PSA_139_3: Thou compassest my path and my lying down, and art acquainted with all my ways.
kjv.PSA_139_4: For there is not a word in my tongue, but, lo, O Lord, thou knowest it altogether.
kjv.PSA_139_5: Thou hast beset me behind and before, and laid thine hand upon me.
kjv.PSA_139_6: Such knowledge is too wonderful for me; it is high, I cannot attain unto it.
kjv.PSA_139_7: Whither shall I go from thy spirit? or whither shall I flee from thy presence?
kjv.PSA_139_8: If I ascend up into heaven, thou art there: if I make my bed in hell, behold, thou art there.
kjv.PSA_139_9: If I take the wings of the morning, and dwell in the uttermost parts of the sea;
kjv.PSA_139_10: Even there shall thy hand lead me, and thy right hand shall hold me.
kjv.PSA_139_11: If I say, Surely the darkness shall cover me; even the night shall be light about me.
kjv.PSA_139_12: Yea, the darkness hideth not from thee; but the night shineth as the day: the darkness and the light are both alike to thee.
kjv.PSA_139_13: For thou hast possessed my reins: thou hast covered me in my mother's womb.
kjv.PSA_139_14: I will praise thee; for I am fearfully and wonderfully made: marvellous are thy works; and that my soul knoweth right well.
kjv.PSA_139_15: My substance was not hid from thee, when I was made in secret, and curiously wrought in the lowest parts of the earth.
kjv.PSA_139_16: Thine eyes did see my substance, yet being unperfect; and in thy book all my members were written, which in continuance were fashioned, when as yet there was none of them.
kjv.PSA_139_17: How precious also are thy thoughts unto me, O God! how great is the sum of them!
kjv.PSA_139_18: If I should count them, they are more in number than the sand: when I awake, I am still with thee.
kjv.PSA_139_19: Surely thou wilt slay the wicked, O God: depart from me therefore, ye bloody men.
kjv.PSA_139_20: For they speak against thee wickedly, and thine enemies take thy name in vain.
kjv.PSA_139_21: Do not I hate them, O Lord, that hate thee? and am not I grieved with those that rise up against thee?
kjv.PSA_139_22: I hate them with perfect hatred: I count them mine enemies.
kjv.PSA_139_23: Search me, O God, and know my heart: try me, and know my thoughts:
kjv.PSA_139_24: And see if there be any wicked way in me, and lead me in the way everlasting.
kjv.PSA_140_1: Deliver me, O Lord, from the evil man: preserve me from the violent man;
kjv.PSA_140_2: Which imagine mischiefs in their heart; continually are they gathered together for war.
kjv.PSA_140_3: They have sharpened their tongues like a serpent; adders' poison is under their lips. Selah.
kjv.PSA_140_4: Keep me, O Lord, from the hands of the wicked; preserve me from the violent man; who have purposed to overthrow my goings.
kjv.PSA_140_5: The proud have hid a snare for me, and cords; they have spread a net by the wayside; they have set gins for me. Selah.
kjv.PSA_140_6: I said unto the Lord, Thou art my God: hear the voice of my supplications, O Lord.
kjv.PSA_140_7: O God the Lord, the strength of my salvation, thou hast covered my head in the day of battle.
kjv.PSA_140_8: Grant not, O Lord, the desires of the wicked: further not his wicked device; lest they exalt themselves. Selah.
kjv.PSA_140_9: As for the head of those that compass me about, let the mischief of their own lips cover them.
kjv.PSA_140_10: Let burning coals fall upon them: let them be cast into the fire; into deep pits, that they rise not up again.
kjv.PSA_140_11: Let not an evil speaker be established in the earth: evil shall hunt the violent man to overthrow him.
kjv.PSA_140_12: I know that the Lord will maintain the cause of the afflicted, and the right of the poor.
kjv.PSA_140_13: Surely the righteous shall give thanks unto thy name: the upright shall dwell in thy presence.
kjv.PSA_141_1: Lord, I cry unto thee: make haste unto me; give ear unto my voice, when I cry unto thee.
kjv.PSA_141_2: Let my prayer be set forth before thee as incense; and the lifting up of my hands as the evening sacrifice.
kjv.PSA_141_3: Set a watch, O Lord, before my mouth; keep the door of my lips.
kjv.PSA_141_4: Incline not my heart to any evil thing, to practise wicked works with men that work iniquity: and let me not eat of their dainties.
kjv.PSA_141_5: Let the righteous smite me; it shall be a kindness: and let him reprove me; it shall be an excellent oil, which shall not break my head: for yet my prayer also shall be in their calamities.
kjv.PSA_141_6: When their judges are overthrown in stony places, they shall hear my words; for they are sweet.
kjv.PSA_141_7: Our bones are scattered at the grave's mouth, as when one cutteth and cleaveth wood upon the earth.
kjv.PSA_141_8: But mine eyes are unto thee, O God the Lord: in thee is my trust; leave not my soul destitute.
kjv.PSA_141_9: Keep me from the snares which they have laid for me, and the gins of the workers of iniquity.
kjv.PSA_141_10: Let the wicked fall into their own nets, whilst that I withal escape.
kjv.PSA_142_1: I cried unto the Lord with my voice; with my voice unto the Lord did I make my supplication.
kjv.PSA_142_2: I poured out my complaint before him; I shewed before him my trouble.
kjv.PSA_142_3: When my spirit was overwhelmed within me, then thou knewest my path. In the way wherein I walked have they privily laid a snare for me.
kjv.PSA_142_4: I looked on my right hand, and beheld, but there was no man that would know me: refuge failed me; no man cared for my soul.
kjv.PSA_142_5: I cried unto thee, O Lord: I said, Thou art my refuge and my portion in the land of the living.
kjv.PSA_142_6: Attend unto my cry; for I am brought very low: deliver me from my persecutors; for they are stronger than I.
kjv.PSA_142_7: Bring my soul out of prison, that I may praise thy name: the righteous shall compass me about; for thou shalt deal bountifully with me.
kjv.PSA_143_1: Hear my prayer, O Lord, give ear to my supplications: in thy faithfulness answer me, and in thy righteousness.
kjv.PSA_143_2: And enter not into judgment with thy servant: for in thy sight shall no man living be justified.
kjv.PSA_143_3: For the enemy hath persecuted my soul; he hath smitten my life down to the ground; he hath made me to dwell in darkness, as those that have been long dead.
kjv.PSA_143_4: Therefore is my spirit overwhelmed within me; my heart within me is desolate.
kjv.PSA_143_5: I remember the days of old; I meditate on all thy works; I muse on the work of thy hands.
kjv.PSA_143_6: I stretch forth my hands unto thee: my soul thirsteth after thee, as a thirsty land. Selah.
kjv.PSA_143_7: Hear me speedily, O Lord: my spirit faileth: hide not thy face from me, lest I be like unto them that go down into the pit.
kjv.PSA_143_8: Cause me to hear thy lovingkindness in the morning; for in thee do I trust: cause me to know the way wherein I should walk; for I lift up my soul unto thee.
kjv.PSA_143_9: Deliver me, O Lord, from mine enemies: I flee unto thee to hide me.
kjv.PSA_143_10: Teach me to do thy will; for thou art my God: thy spirit is good; lead me into the land of uprightness.
kjv.PSA_143_11: Quicken me, O Lord, for thy name's sake: for thy righteousness' sake bring my soul out of trouble.
kjv.PSA_143_12: And of thy mercy cut off mine enemies, and destroy all them that afflict my soul: for I am thy servant.
kjv.PSA_144_1: Blessed be the Lord my strength which teacheth my hands to war, and my fingers to fight:
kjv.PSA_144_2: My goodness, and my fortress; my high tower, and my deliverer; my shield, and he in whom I trust; who subdueth my people under me.
kjv.PSA_144_3: Lord, what is man, that thou takest knowledge of him! or the son of man, that thou makest account of him!
kjv.PSA_144_4: Man is like to vanity: his days are as a shadow that passeth away.
kjv.PSA_144_5: Bow thy heavens, O Lord, and come down: touch the mountains, and they shall smoke.
kjv.PSA_144_6: Cast forth lightning, and scatter them: shoot out thine arrows, and destroy them.
kjv.PSA_144_7: Send thine hand from above; rid me, and deliver me out of great waters, from the hand of strange children;
kjv.PSA_144_8: Whose mouth speaketh vanity, and their right hand is a right hand of falsehood.
kjv.PSA_144_9: I will sing a new song unto thee, O God: upon a psaltery and an instrument of ten strings will I sing praises unto thee.
kjv.PSA_144_10: It is he that giveth salvation unto kings: who delivereth David his servant from the hurtful sword.
kjv.PSA_144_11: Rid me, and deliver me from the hand of strange children, whose mouth speaketh vanity, and their right hand is a right hand of falsehood:
kjv.PSA_144_12: That our sons may be as plants grown up in their youth; that our daughters may be as corner stones, polished after the similitude of a palace:
kjv.PSA_144_13: That our garners may be full, affording all manner of store: that our sheep may bring forth thousands and ten thousands in our streets:
kjv.PSA_144_14: That our oxen may be strong to labour; that there be no breaking in, nor going out; that there be no complaining in our streets.
kjv.PSA_144_15: Happy is that people, that is in such a case: yea, happy is that people, whose God is the Lord.
kjv.PSA_145_1: I will extol thee, my God, O king; and I will bless thy name for ever and ever.
kjv.PSA_145_2: Every day will I bless thee; and I will praise thy name for ever and ever.
kjv.PSA_145_3: Great is the Lord, and greatly to be praised; and his greatness is unsearchable.
kjv.PSA_145_4: One generation shall praise thy works to another, and shall declare thy mighty acts.
kjv.PSA_145_5: I will speak of the glorious honour of thy majesty, and of thy wondrous works.
kjv.PSA_145_6: And men shall speak of the might of thy terrible acts: and I will declare thy greatness.
kjv.PSA_145_7: They shall abundantly utter the memory of thy great goodness, and shall sing of thy righteousness.
kjv.PSA_145_8: The Lord is gracious, and full of compassion; slow to anger, and of great mercy.
kjv.PSA_145_9: The Lord is good to all: and his tender mercies are over all his works.
kjv.PSA_145_10: All thy works shall praise thee, O Lord; and thy saints shall bless thee.
kjv.PSA_145_11: They shall speak of the glory of thy kingdom, and talk of thy power;
kjv.PSA_145_12: To make known to the sons of men his mighty acts, and the glorious majesty of his kingdom.
kjv.PSA_145_13: Thy kingdom is an everlasting kingdom, and thy dominion endureth throughout all generations.
kjv.PSA_145_14: The Lord upholdeth all that fall, and raiseth up all those that be bowed down.
kjv.PSA_145_15: The eyes of all wait upon thee; and thou givest them their meat in due season.
kjv.PSA_145_16: Thou openest thine hand, and satisfiest the desire of every living thing.
kjv.PSA_145_17: The Lord is righteous in all his ways, and holy in all his works.
kjv.PSA_145_18: The Lord is nigh unto all them that call upon him, to all that call upon him in truth.
kjv.PSA_145_19: He will fulfil the desire of them that fear him: he also will hear their cry, and will save them.
kjv.PSA_145_20: The Lord preserveth all them that love him: but all the wicked will he destroy.
kjv.PSA_145_21: My mouth shall speak the praise of the Lord: and let all flesh bless his holy name for ever and ever.
kjv.PSA_146_1: Praise ye the Lord. Praise the Lord, O my soul.
kjv.PSA_146_2: While I live will I praise the Lord: I will sing praises unto my God while I have any being.
kjv.PSA_146_3: Put not your trust in princes, nor in the son of man, in whom there is no help.
kjv.PSA_146_4: His breath goeth forth, he returneth to his earth; in that very day his thoughts perish.
kjv.PSA_146_5: Happy is he that hath the God of Jacob for his help, whose hope is in the Lord his God:
kjv.PSA_146_6: Which made heaven, and earth, the sea, and all that therein is: which keepeth truth for ever:
kjv.PSA_146_7: Which executeth judgment for the oppressed: which giveth food to the hungry. The Lord looseth the prisoners:
kjv.PSA_146_8: The Lord openeth the eyes of the blind: the Lord raiseth them that are bowed down: the Lord loveth the righteous:
kjv.PSA_146_9: The Lord preserveth the strangers; he relieveth the fatherless and widow: but the way of the wicked he turneth upside down.
kjv.PSA_146_10: The Lord shall reign for ever, even thy God, O Zion, unto all generations. Praise ye the Lord.
kjv.PSA_147_1: Praise ye the Lord: for it is good to sing praises unto our God; for it is pleasant; and praise is comely.
kjv.PSA_147_2: The Lord doth build up Jerusalem: he gathereth together the outcasts of Israel.
kjv.PSA_147_3: He healeth the broken in heart, and bindeth up their wounds.
kjv.PSA_147_4: He telleth the number of the stars; he calleth them all by their names.
kjv.PSA_147_5: Great is our Lord, and of great power: his understanding is infinite.
kjv.PSA_147_6: The Lord lifteth up the meek: he casteth the wicked down to the ground.
kjv.PSA_147_7: Sing unto the Lord with thanksgiving; sing praise upon the harp unto our God:
kjv.PSA_147_8: Who covereth the heaven with clouds, who prepareth rain for the earth, who maketh grass to grow upon the mountains.
kjv.PSA_147_9: He giveth to the beast his food, and to the young ravens which cry.
kjv.PSA_147_10: He delighteth not in the strength of the horse: he taketh not pleasure in the legs of a man.
kjv.PSA_147_11: The Lord taketh pleasure in them that fear him, in those that hope in his mercy.
kjv.PSA_147_12: Praise the Lord, O Jerusalem; praise thy God, O Zion.
kjv.PSA_147_13: For he hath strengthened the bars of thy gates; he hath blessed thy children within thee.
kjv.PSA_147_14: He maketh peace in thy borders, and filleth thee with the finest of the wheat.
kjv.PSA_147_15: He sendeth forth his commandment upon earth: his word runneth very swiftly.
kjv.PSA_147_16: He giveth snow like wool: he scattereth the hoarfrost like ashes.
kjv.PSA_147_17: He casteth forth his ice like morsels: who can stand before his cold?
kjv.PSA_147_18: He sendeth out his word, and melteth them: he causeth his wind to blow, and the waters flow.
kjv.PSA_147_19: He sheweth his word unto Jacob, his statutes and his judgments unto Israel.
kjv.PSA_147_20: He hath not dealt so with any nation: and as for his judgments, they have not known them. Praise ye the Lord.
kjv.PSA_148_1: Praise ye the Lord. Praise ye the Lord from the heavens: praise him in the heights.
kjv.PSA_148_2: Praise ye him, all his angels: praise ye him, all his hosts.
kjv.PSA_148_3: Praise ye him, sun and moon: praise him, all ye stars of light.
kjv.PSA_148_4: Praise him, ye heavens of heavens, and ye waters that be above the heavens.
kjv.PSA_148_5: Let them praise the name of the Lord: for he commanded, and they were created.
kjv.PSA_148_6: He hath also stablished them for ever and ever: he hath made a decree which shall not pass.
kjv.PSA_148_7: Praise the Lord from the earth, ye dragons, and all deeps:
kjv.PSA_148_8: Fire, and hail; snow, and vapours; stormy wind fulfilling his word:
kjv.PSA_148_9: Mountains, and all hills; fruitful trees, and all cedars:
kjv.PSA_148_10: Beasts, and all cattle; creeping things, and flying fowl:
kjv.PSA_148_11: Kings of the earth, and all people; princes, and all judges of the earth:
kjv.PSA_148_12: Both young men, and maidens; old men, and children:
kjv.PSA_148_13: Let them praise the name of the Lord: for his name alone is excellent; his glory is above the earth and heaven.
kjv.PSA_148_14: He also exalteth the horn of his people, the praise of all his saints; even of the children of Israel, a people near unto him. Praise ye the Lord.
kjv.PSA_149_1: Praise ye the Lord. Sing unto the Lord a new song, and his praise in the congregation of saints.
kjv.PSA_149_2: Let Israel rejoice in him that made him: let the children of Zion be joyful in their King.
kjv.PSA_149_3: Let them praise his name in the dance: let them sing praises unto him with the timbrel and harp.
kjv.PSA_149_4: For the Lord taketh pleasure in his people: he will beautify the meek with salvation.
