net.PSA_139_18: If I tried to count them, they would outnumber the grains of sand. Even if I finished counting them, I would still have to contend with you.
net.PSA_139_19: If only you would kill the wicked, O God! Get away from me, you violent men!
net.PSA_139_20: They rebel against you and act deceitfully; your enemies lie.
net.PSA_139_21: O Lord, do I not hate those who hate you, and despise those who oppose you?
net.PSA_139_22: I absolutely hate them; they have become my enemies.
net.PSA_139_23: Examine me, O God, and probe my thoughts. Test me, and know my concerns.
net.PSA_139_24: See if there is any idolatrous way in me, and lead me in the everlasting way.
net.PSA_140_1: O Lord, rescue me from wicked men. Protect me from violent men,
net.PSA_140_2: who plan ways to harm me. All day long they stir up conflict.
net.PSA_140_3: Their tongues wound like a serpent; a viper’s venom is behind their lips. (Selah)
net.PSA_140_4: O Lord, shelter me from the power of the wicked. Protect me from violent men, who plan to knock me over.
net.PSA_140_5: Proud men hide a snare for me; evil men spread a net by the path. They set traps for me. (Selah)
net.PSA_140_6: I say to the Lord, “You are my God.” O Lord, pay attention to my plea for mercy.
net.PSA_140_7: O Sovereign Lord, my strong deliverer, you shield my head in the day of battle.
net.PSA_140_8: O Lord, do not let the wicked have their way. Do not allow their plan to succeed when they attack. (Selah)
net.PSA_140_9: As for the heads of those who surround me— may the harm done by their lips overwhelm them.
net.PSA_140_10: May he rain down fiery coals upon them. May he throw them into the fire. From bottomless pits they will not escape.
net.PSA_140_11: A slanderer will not endure on the earth; calamity will hunt down a violent man and strike him down.
net.PSA_140_12: I know that the Lord defends the cause of the oppressed and vindicates the poor.
net.PSA_140_13: Certainly the godly will give thanks to your name; the morally upright will live in your presence.
net.PSA_141_1: O Lord, I cry out to you. Come quickly to me. Pay attention to me when I cry out to you.
net.PSA_141_2: May you accept my prayer like incense, my uplifted hands like the evening offering.
net.PSA_141_3: O Lord, place a guard on my mouth. Protect the opening of my lips.
net.PSA_141_4: Do not let me have evil desires, or participate in sinful activities with men who behave wickedly. I will not eat their delicacies.
net.PSA_141_5: May the godly strike me in love and correct me. May my head not refuse choice oil. Indeed, my prayer is a witness against their evil deeds.
net.PSA_141_6: They will be thrown over the side of a cliff by their judges. They will listen to my words, for they are pleasant.
net.PSA_141_7: As when one plows and breaks up the soil, so our bones are scattered at the mouth of Sheol.
net.PSA_141_8: Surely I am looking to you, O Sovereign Lord. In you I take shelter. Do not expose me to danger.
net.PSA_141_9: Protect me from the snare they have laid for me, and the traps the evildoers have set.
net.PSA_141_10: Let the wicked fall into their own nets, while I escape.
net.PSA_142_1: To the Lord I cry out; to the Lord I plead for mercy.
net.PSA_142_2: I pour out my lament before him; I tell him about my troubles.
net.PSA_142_3: Even when my strength leaves me, you watch my footsteps. In the path where I walk they have hidden a trap for me.
net.PSA_142_4: Look to the right and see. No one cares about me. I have nowhere to run; no one is concerned about my life.
net.PSA_142_5: I cry out to you, O Lord; I say, “You are my shelter, my security in the land of the living.”
net.PSA_142_6: Listen to my cry for help, for I am in serious trouble. Rescue me from those who chase me, for they are stronger than I am.
net.PSA_142_7: Free me from prison, that I may give thanks to your name. Because of me the godly will assemble, for you will vindicate me.
net.PSA_143_1: O Lord, hear my prayer. Pay attention to my plea for help. Because of your faithfulness and justice, answer me.
net.PSA_143_2: Do not sit in judgment on your servant, for no one alive is innocent before you.
net.PSA_143_3: Certainly my enemies chase me. They smash me into the ground. They force me to live in dark regions, like those who have been dead for ages.
net.PSA_143_4: My strength leaves me; I am absolutely shocked.
net.PSA_143_5: I recall the old days. I meditate on all you have done; I reflect on your accomplishments.
net.PSA_143_6: I spread my hands out to you in prayer; my soul thirsts for you in a parched land. (Selah)
net.PSA_143_7: Answer me quickly, Lord. My strength is fading. Do not reject me, or I will join those descending into the grave.
net.PSA_143_8: May I hear about your loyal love in the morning, for I trust in you. Show me the way I should go, because I long for you.
net.PSA_143_9: Rescue me from my enemies, O Lord. I run to you for protection.
net.PSA_143_10: Teach me to do what pleases you, for you are my God. May your kind presence lead me into a level land.
net.PSA_143_11: O Lord, for the sake of your reputation, revive me. Because of your justice, rescue me from trouble.
net.PSA_143_12: As a demonstration of your loyal love, destroy my enemies. Annihilate all who threaten my life, for I am your servant.
net.PSA_144_1: The Lord, my Protector, deserves praise — the one who trains my hands for battle, and my fingers for war,
net.PSA_144_2: who loves me and is my stronghold, my refuge and my deliverer, my shield and the one in whom I take shelter, who makes nations submit to me.
net.PSA_144_3: O Lord, of what importance is the human race, that you should notice them? Of what importance is mankind, that you should be concerned about them?
net.PSA_144_4: People are like a vapor, their days like a shadow that disappears.
net.PSA_144_5: O Lord, make the sky sink and come down. Touch the mountains and make them smolder.
net.PSA_144_6: Hurl lightning bolts and scatter the enemy. Shoot your arrows and rout them.
net.PSA_144_7: Reach down from above. Grab me and rescue me from the surging water, from the power of foreigners,
net.PSA_144_8: who speak lies, and make false promises.
net.PSA_144_9: O God, I will sing a new song to you. Accompanied by a ten-stringed instrument, I will sing praises to you,
net.PSA_144_10: the one who delivers kings, and rescued David his servant from a deadly sword.
net.PSA_144_11: Grab me and rescue me from the power of foreigners, who speak lies, and make false promises.
net.PSA_144_12: Then our sons will be like plants, that quickly grow to full size. Our daughters will be like corner pillars, carved like those in a palace.
net.PSA_144_13: Our storehouses will be full, providing all kinds of food. Our sheep will multiply by the thousands and fill our pastures.
net.PSA_144_14: Our cattle will be weighted down with produce. No one will break through our walls, no one will be taken captive, and there will be no terrified cries in our city squares.
net.PSA_144_15: How blessed are the people who experience these things. How blessed are the people whose God is the Lord.
net.PSA_145_1: I will extol you, my God, O King. I will praise your name continually.
net.PSA_145_2: Every day I will praise you. I will praise your name continually.
net.PSA_145_3: The Lord is great and certainly worthy of praise. No one can fathom his greatness.
net.PSA_145_4: One generation will praise your deeds to another, and tell about your mighty acts.
net.PSA_145_5: I will focus on your honor and majestic splendor, and your amazing deeds.
net.PSA_145_6: They will proclaim the power of your awesome acts. I will declare your great deeds.
net.PSA_145_7: They will talk about the fame of your great kindness, and sing about your justice.
net.PSA_145_8: The Lord is merciful and compassionate; he is patient and demonstrates great loyal love.
net.PSA_145_9: The Lord is good to all, and has compassion on all he has made.
net.PSA_145_10: All your works will give thanks to you, Lord. Your loyal followers will praise you.
net.PSA_145_11: They will proclaim the splendor of your kingdom; they will tell about your power,
net.PSA_145_12: so that mankind might acknowledge your mighty acts, and the majestic splendor of your kingdom.
net.PSA_145_13: Your kingdom is an eternal kingdom, and your dominion endures through all generations.
net.PSA_145_14: The Lord supports all who fall, and lifts up all who are bent over.
net.PSA_145_15: Everything looks to you in anticipation, and you provide them with food on a regular basis.
net.PSA_145_16: You open your hand, and fill every living thing with the food it desires.
net.PSA_145_17: The Lord is just in all his actions, and exhibits love in all he does.
net.PSA_145_18: The Lord is near all who cry out to him, all who cry out to him sincerely.
net.PSA_145_19: He satisfies the desire of his loyal followers; he hears their cry for help and delivers them.
net.PSA_145_20: The Lord protects all those who love him, but he destroys all the wicked.
net.PSA_145_21: My mouth will praise the Lord. Let all who live praise his holy name forever.
net.PSA_146_1: Praise the Lord. Praise the Lord, O my soul.
net.PSA_146_2: I will praise the Lord as long as I live. I will sing praises to my God as long as I exist.
net.PSA_146_3: Do not trust in princes, or in human beings, who cannot deliver.
net.PSA_146_4: Their life’s breath departs, they return to the ground. On that day their plans die.
net.PSA_146_5: How blessed is the one whose helper is the God of Jacob, whose hope is in the Lord his God,
net.PSA_146_6: the one who made heaven and earth, the sea, and all that is in them, who remains forever faithful,
net.PSA_146_7: vindicates the oppressed, and gives food to the hungry. The Lord releases the imprisoned.
net.PSA_146_8: The Lord gives sight to the blind. The Lord lifts up all who are bent over. The Lord loves the godly.
net.PSA_146_9: The Lord protects the resident foreigner. He lifts up the fatherless and the widow, but he opposes the wicked.
net.PSA_146_10: The Lord rules forever, your God, O Zion, throughout the generations to come. Praise the Lord!
net.PSA_147_1: Praise the Lord, for it is good to sing praises to our God. Yes, praise is pleasant and appropriate.
net.PSA_147_2: The Lord rebuilds Jerusalem, and gathers the exiles of Israel.
net.PSA_147_3: He heals the brokenhearted, and bandages their wounds.
net.PSA_147_4: He counts the number of the stars; he names all of them.
net.PSA_147_5: Our Lord is great and has awesome power; there is no limit to his wisdom.
net.PSA_147_6: The Lord lifts up the oppressed, but knocks the wicked to the ground.
net.PSA_147_7: Offer to the Lord a song of thanks. Sing praises to our God to the accompaniment of a harp.
net.PSA_147_8: He covers the sky with clouds, provides the earth with rain, and causes grass to grow on the hillsides.
net.PSA_147_9: He gives food to the animals, and to the young ravens when they chirp.
net.PSA_147_10: He is not enamored with the strength of a horse, nor is he impressed by the warrior’s strong legs.
net.PSA_147_11: The Lord takes delight in his faithful followers, and in those who wait for his loyal love.
net.PSA_147_12: Extol the Lord, O Jerusalem. Praise your God, O Zion.
net.PSA_147_13: For he makes the bars of your gates strong. He blesses your children within you.
net.PSA_147_14: He brings peace to your territory. He abundantly provides for you the best grain.
net.PSA_147_15: He sends his command through the earth; swiftly his order reaches its destination.
net.PSA_147_16: He sends the snow that is white like wool; he spreads the frost that is white like ashes.
net.PSA_147_17: He throws his hailstones like crumbs. Who can withstand the cold wind he sends?
net.PSA_147_18: He then orders it all to melt; he breathes on it, and the water flows.
net.PSA_147_19: He proclaims his word to Jacob, his statutes and regulations to Israel.
net.PSA_147_20: He has not done so with any other nation; they are not aware of his regulations. Praise the Lord!
net.PSA_148_1: Praise the Lord. Praise the Lord from the sky. Praise him in the heavens.
net.PSA_148_2: Praise him, all his angels. Praise him, all his heavenly assembly.
net.PSA_148_3: Praise him, O sun and moon. Praise him, all you shiny stars.
net.PSA_148_4: Praise him, O highest heaven, and you waters above the sky.
net.PSA_148_5: Let them praise the name of the Lord, for he gave the command and they came into existence.
net.PSA_148_6: He established them so they would endure; he issued a decree that will not be revoked.
net.PSA_148_7: Praise the Lord from the earth, you sea creatures and all you ocean depths,
net.PSA_148_8: O fire and hail, snow and clouds, O stormy wind that carries out his orders,
net.PSA_148_9: you mountains and all you hills, you fruit trees and all you cedars,
net.PSA_148_10: you animals and all you cattle, you creeping things and birds,
net.PSA_148_11: you kings of the earth and all you nations, you princes and all you leaders on the earth,
net.PSA_148_12: you young men and young women, you elderly, along with you children.
net.PSA_148_13: Let them praise the name of the Lord, for his name alone is exalted; his majesty extends over the earth and sky.
net.PSA_148_14: He has made his people victorious, and given all his loyal followers reason to praise— the Israelites, the people who are close to him. Praise the Lord!
net.PSA_149_1: Praise the Lord. Sing to the Lord a new song. Praise him in the assembly of the godly.
net.PSA_149_2: Let Israel rejoice in their Creator. Let the people of Zion delight in their King.
net.PSA_149_3: Let them praise his name with dancing. Let them sing praises to him to the accompaniment of the tambourine and harp.
net.PSA_149_4: For the Lord takes delight in his people; he exalts the oppressed by delivering them.
net.PSA_149_5: Let the godly rejoice because of their vindication. Let them shout for joy upon their beds.
net.PSA_149_6: May the praises of God be in their mouths and a two-edged sword in their hands,
net.PSA_149_7: in order to take revenge on the nations, and punish foreigners.
net.PSA_149_8: The godly bind their enemies’ kings in chains, and their nobles in iron shackles,
net.PSA_149_9: and execute the judgment to which their enemies have been sentenced. All his loyal followers will be vindicated. Praise the Lord.
net.PSA_150_1: Praise the Lord! Praise God in his sanctuary; praise him in the sky, which testifies to his strength!
net.PSA_150_2: Praise him for his mighty acts; praise him for his surpassing greatness!
net.PSA_150_3: Praise him with the blast of the horn; praise him with the lyre and the harp!
net.PSA_150_4: Praise him with the tambourine and with dancing; praise him with stringed instruments and the flute!
net.PSA_150_5: Praise him with loud cymbals; praise him with clanging cymbals!
net.PSA_150_6: Let everything that has breath praise the Lord! Praise the Lord!
